BTC-USD.reasoning: BTC is not at a genuine mean reversion extreme. Daily Z-score of 1.20 is above the neutral band (-1 to +1) but far short of the ±2 threshold required for a mean reversion setup. Distance from 50-SMA is 4.97% — noteworthy but not extreme enough to trigger a fade. RSI at 63.2 is elevated but not in overbought territory (>75). Bollinger Band position at 0.675 shows price in the upper half of the band but not outside it. MFI at 77.1 is close to overbought. Recent price action shows a sharp rejection from the Apr 17 high of $77,127 down to $73,856 on Apr 19, then a partial recovery to $75,569 — suggesting the overbought condition may already be resolving. Hourly Z-score of 0.45 confirms no hourly extreme. No clear reversal candle pattern with confirmation. Waiting for either a push to Z-score ≥2 (overbought) or a deeper pullback below -1 Z-score before engaging. Currently in no-trade zone.
